title: stachys zoharyana
intro: Stachys zoharyana, also known as Stachys persica, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stachys zoharyana include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, Stachys zoharyana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
